content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with IT (+1.58%), Pharma (+1.39%), Metal (+1.52%), Auto (+1.05%), Realty (+1.48%) all leading. VIX cooling -3.65% to 18.99 supports risk-on. Nasdaq +1.63% overnight is positive global cue. However, book is already 68% deployed with multiple positions in profit — focus shifts to position management (trailing stops) over new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24150
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 76.00,
      "new_target": 85.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "PSU bank momentum intact, MAHABANK Q4 results were strong (PAT +27%, GNPA 1.45%). Stock recovered to 79.90 from earlier weakness, intraday opened 79.13 with strength. Tightening SL from 74.50 to 76.00 — still below recent swing low of 76.98 (Apr 21) but reduces risk on this -2% position. Target unchanged at 85 (near 52w high 82.15 + breakout extension)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1005.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong winner +6.8%, opened at 1045 today (higher again). Trailing SL up from 1030.47 to 1005 — locks in ~2.1% gain, sits below Apr 23 low of 981 with a buffer. Bullish HFC thesis, brokerage TP 1143. Target 1100 unchanged. Trail is conservative because position is large and volatile."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position, flat P&L. Gold pulling back near-term but structural bullish thesis intact. SL 119 (~4.7% away) gives appropriate buffer for a low-vol ETF. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1413.00,
      "new_target": 1480.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Stock making new 52w highs at 1430+ today. Q4 was a strong beat (revenue +22.6%, PAT +27%). Moving SL from 1410 to 1413 (just above breakeven) — minor tighten to lock breakeven on this +1.7% position. Target 1480 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results TODAY post-market with investor call 6 PM. SL is at entry (1049.05) — already breakeven-protected. Cannot tighten further pre-event without risk of being whipsawed by intraday volatility. HOLD into the binary event with current SL providing capital protection."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 681.00,
      "new_target": 725.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Stock opened 693 today, now 689.45. Q4 results in 2 days (Apr 29) — binary event. SL already at entry (breakeven). Would prefer to exit before earnings given pre-event uncertainty + Form 483 risk; flagging max_hold_days=5 to enforce review. SL/target unchanged from current — emit HOLD-equivalent (no actual change). Switching to HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Position -1.2%, Q4 results in 3 days (Apr 30) — binary event. SL at 2260 (~3.5% away) is appropriate for a low-vol FMCG name into earnings. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 398.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Stock opened 404.20, now 406.35 (+0.5%). Tightening SL from 393 to 398 — just below entry, reduces downside while keeping room for normal vol. Q4 results May 15. Target 425 unchanged."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 76.00,
      "reasoning": "PSU bank sector strong, results were good. Tightening SL to 76 reduces risk on this losing position while honoring the bullish thesis."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1005.00,
      "reasoning": "+6.8% gain — trailing SL to 1005 locks in ~2% profit and respects HFC bull thesis with brokerage TP 1143."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat position, defensive ballast. No change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1413.00,
      "reasoning": "New 52w high being made today on strong Q4 beat. Move SL to breakeven."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results today after market — SL already at entry provides capital protection. Hold through the event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at entry. Pre-earnings (Apr 29) — will reassess on next tick whether to exit before binary event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "-1.2% with Q4 results in 3 days. Existing SL at 2260 is appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 398.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening from 393 to 398 — reduces risk while keeping reasonable buffer in a low-vol utility."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "INDUSINDBK strong post-earnings move (opened 895) — but GNPA elevated and governance overhang make this a no-go for swing entry; lower-quality bank vs alternatives. HINDALCO/SAIL/NMDC all extended at 52w highs in metals — chasing breakouts after a 22-67% rally is poor R:R; would need a pullback to add. SUNPHARMA bearish technically post-Organon deal, MACD bearish crossover — avoid. COALINDIA results today, declining production trend — wait for post-result clarity. TATAPOWER is best power-sector swing candidate but already have NTPC exposure (energy cluster discipline applies).",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 68% deployed — at the hysteresis threshold. Three holdings (AUBANK, GRANULES, HINDUNILVR) face binary earnings events within 3 days; net unrealized P&L is only +0.5% so cushion is thin. Correct disposition is NO new entries — focus is locking in gains via SL trails on PNBHOUSING/NESTLEIND/NTPC and protecting losers (MAHABANK trail). Cluster exposure check: PNBHOUSING + AUBANK + MAHABANK = ~26% of capital in rate-sensitive financials cluster — at limit, no more financial adds. Energy cluster: NTPC is solo, room to add if a clear setup appears but TATAPOWER would push toward concentration."
}
